name: agent-skill-vps-kit
description: AI agent skill for VPS hardening, audit, and bootstrap. Two paths: audit & harden an existing server (Docker + apps already running), or bootstrap a fresh empty host.
author: Murugadoss

skills.name: vps-provisioning
skills.description: Two paths: (A) audit & harden an existing server that runs Docker/apps without disrupting them; (B) bootstrap a fresh empty VPS into a known stack. Teaches default-deny UFW, port classification (public/private/loopback), and the Docker-bypasses-UFW gotcha.
